---
title: "SMARTX_H2s_Compile"
output: pdf_document
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
---

```{r}
library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(purrr)
library(data.table)
library(tidyverse)
```


```{r}


year <- "2025"

H2S_path <- "GCReW_SMARTX_Porewater_"

H2S_may_dat <-  read.csv(here("..", "GCREW","SMARTX", "Porewater", "Sulfide", year, "Processed Data", paste0(H2S_path, "H2S_", year, "05", ".csv")))

H2S_july_dat <-  read.csv(here("..", "GCREW","SMARTX", "Porewater", "Sulfide", year, "Processed Data", paste0(H2S_path, "H2S_", year, "07", ".csv")))

H2S_sept_dat <-  read.csv(here("..", "GCREW","SMARTX", "Porewater", "Sulfide", year, "Processed Data", paste0(H2S_path, "H2S_", year, "09", ".csv")))

```

```{r}
H2S_dat <- rbind(H2S_july_dat[,-1], H2S_may_dat[,-1], H2S_sept_dat[,-1])
```

```{r}
write.csv(H2S_dat, paste0("SMARTX_Porewater_H2S_", year, ".csv"))

```
